title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kawamatsu, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Kiku, Roger as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone sent those guys fly- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Take him too lightly, and you'll lose.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see your strength has not waned, Kawamatsu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like swim- ming even the torrents of the great rivers...

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: Such is the Fierce Kappa style!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I have nevertheless lived out these 13 years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I had heard poisonous fish were delicious.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I think of the disgrace my Lord suffered, all hardships seem but a spring breeze!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was wrong. My organs are groaning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I have waited long for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kozi is family retainer yoko2u NA Kawamatsi

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad! The Red Sheath's Been Released!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kiku?! I see you haven't changed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am glad to see you once more in this world!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kiku?! since when have you been here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: URgh... Forgive me. 13 years of nausea hit me at once.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prepare the plague bullets! Men, get into combat positions!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's going on?! How do we have three intruders?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Who the heck is this huge woman?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'm not going to be a fan of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Men whose spirits have been broken,

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
